result.finding: runs/pfas-rice-oos-multidataset: the K_PL-gated lipid mechanism (fit on Yamazaki, NOT on Kim) predicts the independent Kim 2019 brown-rice grain BAF (excl. PFOA) out-of-sample at log10 RMSE 0.48 (~factor 3) vs the free/monotone baseline 2.05 -- screening-adequate dietary prediction, uniquely capturing the grain long-chain rise.
